channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET? — 87 replies — 348.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Open thread • Replies: 87 • Updated: 2026-04-27 21:08 UTC

OP

Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Early replies (first 3)

62158601
>>62158557
Neet
Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.
might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

62158623
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

while waging at walmart is impossible

62158626
>>62158557
I prefer to be a neet, but ofc neither situation is perfect. Now if i was getting pussy then we'd be talking

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62159554
>>62159513
>i miss having money god damn
but then you'll miss the free time to do cool shit you can only do while NEETing

62159563
>>62159502
lol
lmao

62159628
being neet sucks immensely after like a year tops

62159697
>>62159628
I have neeting for 12 years

62159870
>>62158557
neet life is utterly depressing and you end up enjoying nothing, we have not evolved to not be productive
>t. 36 years old neet

62159886
>>62159870
Why aren’t you productive? I been neeting 12 years.

62159896
It depends on the type of wagie. I don't understand people who can't do better than a typical retail.warehouse job. How retarded do you have to be to be unable to get any white collar job?

62159910
>>62159886
I have chronic depression so I have zero drive and also generalized anxiety and get panic attacks trying to apply to jobs and I'm generally very uncomfortable around people

62159930
>>62159910
Not to sound like a dick but youre not “neet”, youre mentally ill. You give neets a bad name.

62159982
>>62158557
WFH jobs are basically NEET Premium.

62159990
>>62158557
NEET has no money to invest so they miss everything lol

62159993
>>62158557
They're both lousy, just in different ways.

62160017
>>62159930
what the fuck do you think neet stands for you retard, being neet doesn't make you cool you dumb zoomer

62160033
>>62158601
this will make neets seethe

62160048
>>62158601
> Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize. might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

He is speaking in context of somebody that is not a normie. For people who are not normie tier or higher jobs are a massive humiliation ritual. Neetdom is sad but it’s much better than every day humiliation

62160055
>>62159212
Nice looking dog

62160089
>>62160017
You are mentally ill + neet. You gotta make that clear. I am neet but not mentally ill.

62160116
>>62160055
Much appreciated, fren. I've been clearing out all the cacti in the area for her today

62160200
>>62160089
who gives a shit? it's neet either way, you think you're well adjusted? bitch you can't even get a job.

62163009
Both suck, seriously. Neet is prob a bit better if you don't have to worry about money and have some hobbies.

62163039
life sucks and then you die. it learned that on mtv

62163107
>>62158601

62163142
>>62160200
the distinction is a regular neet has a choice. if you're mentally ill, it's not like you're choosing to be a neet. society has rejected you. you have no choice.

62163160
neet but only if you have a very fixed income. so a trust fund or no mortage or whatever.
if you dont, then its nightmare fuel

62163185
>>62158666
Woah.
Hold up anon.
So I have Ck3 on the steam deck but have not played it yet. Don't tell me it's only a great experience on PC.

62163204
Both suck unless you have the right mindset
By and large, people are happier waging because they need the money, there's less stigma attached to it and they appreciate the structure it gives to their lives

62163250
>>62159210
Back in 2021 I needed and generally made ends meet with shit coin gambling. Then again my studio was $550 and I only ever really ate cereal and top ramen.

62163253
>>62158557
as someone who did both I would say neet. at least with a wagie job I can do hobbies in my spare time and save money. as a neet you feel constant existential dread in the back of your mind, this shit numbs you to everything and you never feel like doing something.

62163255
>>62159328
This is true. It's kinda amazing.

62163281
>>62163142
Neet is not in education, employment or training. Goyim with Govbucks(for whatever reason) are Neets and were the forerunners for the modern image of Neets that /biz/ has

item.title: >tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this? — 79 replies — 316.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this?

Open thread • Replies: 79 • Updated: 2026-04-27 20:58 UTC

OP

>tfw fell for the NEET meme
how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5

Early replies (first 3)

62156768
I would unironically wagecuck still if I was able to take vacation whenever I want. I don't enjoyed scheduling things like that or requiring permission.

62156775
>>62156751
I became a neet because of crippling social anxiety, not out of choice.
I suspect many are the same.

62156779
>>62156751
see you fell for it without having any money, I did that once and then realized that it costs money to do anything other than sit in front of a screen all day every day

Depending on where you live, even going out for a walk will cost you bus fare or gas to get to a decent park. Never felt so trapped, now if I had money to go out and do things like camping or fishing or even just cook nice meals then I would have been a lot happier

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62158410
>>62158001
maybe if you want to die, all those body positivity activists are dead now, some in their early 20s too

62158441
>could NEET due to zog disability payments
>choose not to to upstage my dad in net worth
>odds stacked against me due to boomer/zoomer financial divide
Sampler fry

62158455
>>62157602
never gonna have more anxiety or be more unsure of myself either. i realised that what i had to do was accept who i am and im not just not very good at the life thing.

62158467
i was a neet for 10 (ten) years no im working in a corporate office like a pajeet from the helpdesk but still

62158571
>>62156751
I haven't worked since 2015, but sometimes I have dreams where I decide to show up at my old work and just go to my desk and start working like nothing happened. During the dream I go to work for a year, working for free before I decide to ask my boss to start paying me, including back pay. He says "no" and starts laughing and I wake up in a panic.
What a nightmare that is, i hate that recurring dream.

62158622
you have to do something, you have to have an activity and goals. It's easy for me to say because I went to school for CS so my hobby is programming and so I can just spend all day in front of a PC and feel fulfilled, but if you're not into that you need to find some activity you can do that won't bankrupt you and provide you with meaning.

The germans were right, work will set you free, but people conflate wagecucking with work. Being a wagecuck will not set you free

62158636
>>62156751
I had to persuade myself that not having a job was worse than looking for a job.

62158971
>>62158000
And what did he say?

62159187
>>62156838
Honestly man. I have so much backlog of shit in my life. I wish I could just step into a pocket universe while the real world stops moving, and I go through my backlog.
So many little projects, so many books, so much art. It’s fucking sad really. Here is a boundless, limitless consciousness, limited to a decaying body and a pathetic time limit of which you can only use 16 or so hours
It’s a sick joke really.
>>62156871
Actually there is something else, well in my case.
Without a job, I feel like I am not earning money that I can produce using my skills, and so I kinda don’t feel calm and focused enough to spend time on hobbies. Basically i felt like I am wasting my time, aging, without having any money to help me out, and so I felt too anxious to commit to any hobby.

62159309
>>62156775
The problem is not really you. It's normies. Being you as a schizo amongst normies, makes them feel you are a creep. Now you can fake a normie personality, but it's exhausting. When i'm among non normies people, my social anxiety is lower than with normies. Among real friends that think globally like me, anxiety is almost non existant.

62159344
>>62156838
>>62156871
motherfuck what kind of hobbies do you have that you will spend 16 hours a day 7 days a week doing?

62159371
>>62159344
One of my hobbies is relaxing and there isn’t enough time in the day for it.

62159375
>>62156768
I’m a doctor and i can take vacations with like a 1-2 month notice. I will never stop working, this is the dream (as long as the field doesn’t get too saturated).

62159385
>>62158571
lmao

62159386
>>62159375
You will stop working when you make 1m+ a year from doing nothing

62159410
>>62159386
Who the fuck makes that kind of money? Besides, there is plenty of already rich doctors. Maybe i would asses again exactly what i want to do for work in that situation.

62159425
>>62159410
> Who the fuck makes that kind of money
Everyone who grew up above middle class.
> Besides, there is plenty of already rich doctors.
Exactly. So these doctors bring in over 1m a year in passive income and still work as a doctor?

62159435
>>62159375
>>62159410
So, just like everyone who says “i love my job,” it is only because you have to work it. The moment you don’t get paid for it, you don’t love it and wouldn’t do it for free.

62159530
>>62156751
yeah its horrible i wish i could get any job but i cant even get helldesk with bachelors and experience

hopefully this cert im studying for will land me some job but we will see

62159557
If my living conditions remain the same no matter how much I work, and taxes take all my extra work, what is legitimately the point of working?

62159586
>>62157072
Lololol

62159864
>>62156751
most people are NEET incorrectly, living like bums or mooching off their parents when you SHOULD be mooching off the government
Go get on welfare. Go get on food assistance. Go get on whatever you can and get free gibs from the government.

I get almost $300 a month in foodstamps and $450 in cash assistance. My rent is subsidized based on my income so I pay pennies. I apply for energy assistance programs to pay my light bill for over half the year. I never have to work and all I do is sit around all day long, watch youtube, listen to music, read manga, play video games, draw, and lurk.

62159895
>>62159864
Mooching off parents mean building wealth.

62160013
>>62159864
i don't think i even qualify

62162244
>>62159435
Of course i wouldn’t do it for free but i don’t work for the best possible pay either. There is s balance to it, and it skews heavily on meaningfulness of work instead of the pay.

62162251
>>62159425
This is just weak.

62162273
>>62159864
I noticed you wrote light bill and bragged about being on welfare. please post your hand.

62163096
>>62156775
Take trintellix 10mg it literally cured me I used to have real bad social anxiety and always wanting to fight with people going outside now I just feel chill and normal not stuck in my own head 24/7.


It will make your dick not work though

62163114
>>62156751
Working from home is boring as well, but at least I have money.

62163252
>>62156751
i hate working as much as being a neet
live is shit eitherway when poor and lonely
i just want to go back to school time

item.title: >tfw missed bitcoin >tfw missed NVIDIA >tfw missed SNDK and MU >tfw missed SOXL >tfw missed all the once in a lifetime b… — 28 replies — 112.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tfw missed bitcoin >tfw missed NVIDIA >tfw missed SNDK and MU >tfw missed SOXL >tfw missed all the once in a lifetime b…

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-04-27 21:07 UTC

OP

>tfw missed bitcoin
>tfw missed NVIDIA
>tfw missed SNDK and MU
>tfw missed SOXL
>tfw missed all the once in a lifetime buy opportunities
Please tell me there will be another meme stock in my generation that will 10x my money. There will be more rocketships in the future, right /biz/?

Early replies (first 3)

62159419
>>62159409
Didnt miss cheese
You still have a chance

62159433
>>62159409
Litecoin

62159688
>>62159409
you can still buy GIS

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62159715
>>62159409
Silver unironically.

62159728
>/biz/ is talking about SNDK
It's over I'm not going to make it. I've been talking about this shit for 8 months and nowhere near making it because I didn't put enough in. You faggots are such atop sign it's unbelievable.

Anyway HYPE will 10x easily once orange faggot gets off his ass and makes it legal in the states.

62159733
>>62159419
SHUT THE FUCK UP
STOP SHILLING MEME SHITCOINS

62159741
>>62159409
You could still accumulate a thousand link pretty easily. That's going to get you minimum 6 figures in the next few years.

62159750
>>62159733
In the end everything is a meme shitcoin

62159765
>>62159409
you guys dont listen though. "that stock is already up a lot" is all you say.

AMD and MRVL should still 5x. but you wont DCA. you just claim you missed the whole thing. neither stock will every go any higher...

CRDO and ALAB are a similar story.

62159781
>>62159728
What made you take interest in SNDK before it blew up? I think INTC might be the next moonshot but they have been such a shit company for decades so I don't feel too confident in it desu. After Intel idk what other companies will benefit off of the AI hype. All the big semis and photonics companies already mooned.

62159791
>>62159765
> AMD should still 5x
Bruh you already missed your chance when it was lower 100's for the 5x opportunity.

What is it with this board and only shilling when it's obviously too late? At best you'll get a 2x out of AMD from here, realistically if bullish conditions go on for the remainder of the year.

62159811
>>62159791
>tfw bought AMD when it was 3$ in like 2013
>tfw [spoiler]i only bought 300 shares and sold at like 10$[/spoiler]

62159832
>>62159409
there is always the next thing but you'll statistically miss it

62160363
>>62159409
Uranium. You won't buy it though and will die poor.

62160564
>>62160363
Came to say what this guys said with regard to OP being a coward. Check.

62160585
>>62159781
Genuinely hope it crashes back to 700 bucks so people forget about it and I can load up for the next leg otherwise fuck it.

62160599
>>62159433
this

62160603
>>62159409
there's been a "once in a lifetime" gainer and "once in a lifetime" risk event every 2 years atleast. just chill & dont miss the next ones.

62160610
>>62159409
synthetic conductors
space as a service
lunar whales

62160702
>>62159781
NTA, but I took a few thousand dollar position in July/august because of >>>/g/, or at least I think it was /g/, talking about HBF and its potential for AI, as well as a potential stock surge if the tech worked out. I forgot exactly what board it was but it was definitely on this website and the anon had seemingly made a well researched post. I tried to find it a few weeks back but I couldn't. Of course, SNDK surged for almost unrelated reasons and it's surge was far better than I or that anon ever expected, so I chalk it up mostly to luck.

62162658
>>62159409
and you will miss plenty more in the future.
just accept that you clearly are too risk averse to invest in these kind of stocks.
nothing wrong with simply taking home the 7-10% p.a. from your indexes.
on the bright side, you also missed all the shilled stocks that dumpstered shortly after, you didn't buy silver at the peak, and you didn't lose your money on oil rug pulls either.

62162694
>>62162658
he could been to young have income of his own you fucking retard.
>>62159741
>stack cost $9k
>only 10% move to 6 figure hell
surely you mean 7 figures right?

62162733
>>62162694
>he could been to young
bitcoin is fucking ancient by now.
it's turning almost 20 soon.

62162761
>>62159781
I'm buying up INTC here. This is me second chance, anons.

62162782
>>62162733
im not going to guess op's life story but is it really so hard to fathom that op might actually be... 20 years old? maybe he had some weird life situations and had to support someone other than himself with whatever income he had. but you jumped straight to the assumption that he's a beta with no risk for appetite.

62162807
>>62162782
>but you jumped straight to the assumption that he's
>a beta with no risk for appetite.
more like he's not a retarded gambler. for every retarded gambler on /biz/ who wins, there are at least 10 who lost.
me putting my house on red at the roulette table doesn't make me a good investor just because I won

62163191
>>62159409
I sold nvidia at 190 something and forgot to buy back in...

62163277
>>62159409
>>tfw missed SOXL

Could be worse. You could've only bought a little soxl and now you get to kick yourself for not going all in. Funny part is I bought it just to boost my passive income divvy, now they barely give a divvy and the stock price is insane...

.. not that im complaining.

item.title: When I posted to tell you guys to get in on the South Korean KOSPI you all said it was "too late" Up 22% in a month and… — 6 replies — 19.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
When I posted to tell you guys to get in on the South Korean KOSPI you all said it was "too late" Up 22% in a month and…

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-04-27 20:53 UTC

OP

When I posted to tell you guys to get in on the South Korean KOSPI you all said it was "too late"

Up 22% in a month and up 2.5% today meanwhile btc has does 8% and -1.6% in those timeframes.

Apologise

Early replies (first 3)

62160889
You never told me to get in. I'm out here trying to get rich and you're leaving me hanging.

62160927
>>62160889
You need to spend more time lurking then. Ive made at least three threads in the last month. Your 4chan deficit has cost you thousands

62161393
Peepeepoopoo

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62161467
>>62160927
Accept that your admonitions to purchase are indistinguishable from scams. Grats on the trade though.

62161476
>>62160847
Aren't they the most fucked from oil disruptions from the Gulf tho?

62163239
>>62161476
Interesting theory,

My rebuttal? Pic related.

item.title: >tfw I realized yesterday I could have unironically retired if I had just sold my bitshit in October >tfw I want to kms… — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tfw I realized yesterday I could have unironically retired if I had just sold my bitshit in October >tfw I want to kms…

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-04-27 21:09 UTC

OP

>tfw I realized yesterday I could have unironically retired if I had just sold my bitshit in October
>tfw I want to kms everyday because I'm sick of waging
>tfw I have to wait for this gay retarded nigger market to go back up to escape the wagie cagie
Goddamn I'm so stupid falling for the hodl meme. I'm ngmi, it's OVER.

Early replies (first 3)

62163272
It will drop further then crab for awhile, you will give up and sell and a few weeks after it will skyrocket to the new ATH.

62163282
>>62163272
I know retard, I already said it's OVER. 6 years of hodling for NOTHING but max pain and agony in this peepeepoopoo ana rape market. I unironically hold ROSE, the prolapsed anus coin, btw.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Polkadot - Mumbai Warrior Edition — 109 replies — 380.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - Mumbai Warrior Edition

Open thread • Replies: 109 • Updated: 2026-04-27 20:55 UTC

OP

Hello my fellow PolkaCurry brothers. We are again here, for another thread where we discuss everything related to DOT, Mumbai (the city of DOT), curry and more. The last thread was a resounding success, we managed to keep it alive for literally 41 days. We got paid 11500 + 5*150 = 12250 DOT for the thread and are now living in a period of enlightenment while eating with METAL spoons. Brothers, we have truly reached enlightenment. WE, the Mumbai Warriors will strike yet again and collect generations worth of money !

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

Early replies (first 3)

62115437
We are eating with our METAL spoons in Mumbai. No more hands my brethren. We eat with out spoons, like proud warriors.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62115624
>>62115424
>>62115437

Still gonna larp as an Indian?

62115793
>>62115437

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62144010
>>62143825
>This is sad.
My brother, the sadness is in your own heart. Not mine. You are destroying yourself.

>Also stop larping as an Indian and perhaps you'll get engagement
My brother, I am the one and only Vishnu Kumar. Born and raised in India. I am brown as the mud itself. There is no denying it. I am a true Mumbai warrior. I am a proud Indian.
Also Panjali, didn't people teach you that questions are fundamental for a healthy conversation. My young Panjali, I am not here for engagement. If you asked I would've told you so. Oh young Panjali. You still have a long way ahead of you. If accept, I let go, I move on and I forgive you young Panjali.

Thank you for you kind bump of the thread Panjali. I shall later come to your house and give you your share of the profits.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62146419
My fellow Mumbai warriors. We are all already enlightened, we just need to uncover it. DOT is already the best chain, people just need to realize it. They're still looking at the shadow of their light and misidentifying it for themselves. Soon they shall become aware of it and pivot towards the light.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62148896
100$ end of bull run. Remember my Mumbai warriors. It is still cheap as dirt itself. You want to buy now, before you the GIGA ULTRA MEGA pump happens and you get priced out.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62149307
>>62148896
And then have this larping indian short you

62151325
>>62149307
Pssssstttttt Kamal. Do you want to eat with your hands again or do you want the Mumbai warriors to eat like true kings? With spoons? Young warrior Kamal, you have still much to learn.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62153932
100$ end of bull run

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62155237
My brothers... nirvana is near, it's just around the corner. Stack up on DOT right now or get priced out.

62156822
My Mumbai brethren. I've been informed that the Palk Strait will be closed by the Mumbai warriors. We will now toll all ships and they'll have to pay the toll in DOT.

62157778
>>62115424
Im tired

62158070
>>62157778
Good my brother. The first step to enlightenment is to admit and accept that you're tired. You first need to see your darkness in order for you to bring the light. Those who seek the light have experienced immense darkness. Brother, this is a moment of rejoice. Accept your pain, let it go, move on and forgive yourself or the people who have cause it. But remember brother the world is simply an illusion and by that I mean your own perception of reality. It's all inside you and not in the outside world. A river is not beautiful or magnificent, that's your illusion of it. A river is simply water that is moving, nothing more, nothing less. The illusion feels real because just like when you dream the pain feels real, the fear feels real, the sorrow feels real. Once you wake up from the dream you realize that nothing was real, that it was just an illusion. But it is true that when you were in the dream the pain felt real. So, once we see the illusion for what it is it'll start dissolving and once it dissolves that's then the reason to work inside the world without attachments and to help those who are asleep to wake up.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158170
>>62157778
>>62158070
>The first step to enlightenment is to admit and accept that you're tired.
And then the last step to enlightenment is to realize that there are no steps to enlightenment. It was always there. It was just covered by conditioning, traumas, the ego, ... . Once all of those dissolve it'll uncover enlightenment. So, enlightenment isn't an achievement or something you do, it's literally that you stop doing. It's the fact that the doer stops. The watcher and the watched go away. The only thing that remains is the watching.

62158427
>>
Metoo

62158494
>>62158427
... You forgot to green text young Vishnu mind of the block chain. You too what?

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158686
If you try to tell a person, "Hey bro, there's hope. You're not a loser. I have faith in you. I think you're a good person.", what do they do? They argue with you. They're defended against that. They intellectualize, "There may be hope for other people, but there's no hope for me.". Such a potent intellectual defense mechanism. And what are they defending against? The belief of hope. Because hope hurts. If there's zero chance, there's zero need for effort. See, human beings are really resilient. We can live through genocide and holocaust and all kinds of stuff. We can live through all kinds of terrible things, terrible economic times. We're survivors. But don't give us hope, because if we can hope, we can hurt.

Having hope also exposes you to hurt. And hurt is a normal part of life. If you're hurting that means you're human. It's just. Are you going to hurt consciously and change something or are you going to hurt unconsciously and keep on hurting due to the same thing for the rest of your life?

You maybe haven't "You go this" at the moment. You may feel powerless. You may feel down. And at the same time you'll slowly and gradually regain your power. You'll unburden the weight. Sooner or later you'll feel so light you'll start flying. I really believe that, even though it may at the current moment not feel like it. Even though you might feel like the current moment is never ending trust me, it'll all change and reshape into a healthier future. You got this fren who's reading this.

Your dear Vishnu Kumar wishes you are peaceful day. May Vishnu of the mindchain be with and all around you.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158906
>>62157778
metoo

62158991
>>62158906
That information helps a lot. Thank you for sharing. Now what do we do about that?

62159732
100$ end of bull run. No shot we miss nirvana


Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62161400
What is Gavin Wood up to right now?

62161427
>>62161400
He's back to being CEO of Parity. He also talks at the DOT conventions. He's also a part of the JAM development team. And sometimes he even writes some CP fanfiction to relieve the stress of being a full time awesome guy

62162193
>>62161427
Are you advocating CP?

62162631
>>62162193
Oh little Reyansh we all know you're craving it and are therefore asking. You hear what you want to hear.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62162869
>>62162631
Holy shit you are

Jannies delete thread

62162938
>>62162869
Wow, another pedophile self-reporting.

CIA, get him. These two >>62162193 >>62162869 are basically begging for it.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62162977
>>62162938
You advocated for it

Why support a pedo founded project

62163124
>>62162977
>You advocated for it
I did? How?

>Why support a pedo founded project
Because pedos run the world my young one. You have still much to learn. Gavin is running a CP ring. He is part of the ELITE and therefore DOT will make it because Gavin has the necessary pedo connections. They do call him the ephebophil of the mindchain, right? Do you genuinely believe that someone who isn't involved into this kind of stuff can do anything? Of course not young one. If you want to become part of the elite than you need to play like the big dogs. Human sacrifice and a bit of pedophilia goes a long way in these kind of circles. A bit of beef jerky here and there also never hurt anyone.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62163149
>>62162977
>>62162869
>>62162193
The only thing I see is 3 people projecting their inner desires onto an external object. That's just how projection works. It's like this

Outside (Conscious mind): "I am confident" Vessel
o o
-|- |------------> -|-
/ \ | / \
Inside (Unconscious mind): "I am a loser" -----------|

I am just a vessel for you to offload your projection. It's like the pretty girl clique having an "ugly" chick in order to offload their insecurities onto her. Pretty girls consciously feel pretty but unconsciously feel ugly therefore they tend to have an ugly chick in order to offload that ugliness inside of them onto the ugly chick. Exactly what you 3 guys did just right now. You're consciously against pedophilia, because society has programmed you in that way, yet unconsciously you just want a piece of that 14yo meat. It is what it is guys. I don't judge you for it to be honest.

62163165
>>62163149
>>62162977
>>62162869
>>62162193
See picrel. You can't indent on 4chan

62163202
>>62163165

>>62162869
>>62162977
>>62162193
Just like a bully believes he's "confident" but is actually unconsciously a "loser" and then beats other people in order to project that feeling into the external world you guys are also into CP while trying to accuse me, as an "easy" target, in order to externalize your inner conflict. Bros, it's ok. We can all see your urges. Funny how you 3 suddenly jumped on the band wagon while I didn't even say anything about it, right? Funny how your mind simply latched onto it, right? You 3 self-reported. You probably don't even know it yourself. It's like people who are heavily religious and are forbidden to be gay. And then because they're angry at themselves for hating themselves for being closet fags then they do what? They beat up gay people because they're jelaous someone else is openly gay while they hate themselves because they want to taste the forbidden fruit. Just admit it guys, you want to fuck 14yo, right? To be honest, just google "age of consent by country" and go to Italy if you really want to do that. The age of consent in Italy is 14yo therefore it's legal. You just can't film it and it's ok. Don't believe me? https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Age_of_consent_by_country. Same goes for Germany. In Argentina it's legal to do it with a 13yo. Austria 14, Chile 14, Peru 14, Angola 14, Hungary 14, Panama 14, Serbia 14. Trinidad and Tobago 12. Bosnia 14, ... You get the jist. If you really want to pursue your inner desires you can LEGALLY do it. It's LEGAL in certain places and therefore it's ok, right? People are just programmed to demonize it, even though IT'S LEGAL in MANY COUNTRIES. You can literally have LEGAL CONSENSUAL SEX WITH A 14YO IN A LOT OF COUNTRIES. Just don't film it or pay for her and it's fine.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62163228
>>62163202
I can feel the throbbing hard cocks and the drooling coming right through my screen while people are reading the message. You guys must be having wild fantasies at this point. You guys are fucking wild. I just gave you a guilt free pass to destroy that 14yo pussy in a legal and socially acceptable way. I just unleashed all hell. Let me guess? You three >>62162193, >>62162869 and >>62162977 are probably holding your throbbing dicks in your hands while buying tickets for Italy. You're already manifesting yourself balls deep inside a fine young 14yo Italian gypsy pussy. You 3 are fucking wild man. WILD. Fucking cinema to say the least. Self-reporting, hilarious.

62163243
>>62162193
>>62162869
>>62162977
I'm am just a mere vessel for you pedophilic desires which society has put under constraint. You're just externalizing your deepest wishes that lie in your shadow. It's time that Vishnu Kumar brings the light and shines upon thy. Once you understand that the pedophile is within there will be no more questions, only realization.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

item.title: Ai doomers are broke edition >Educational sites: >Financial TV Streams: >Charts: >Screeners: so you feel like in the mov… — 336 replies — 100.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Ai doomers are broke edition >Educational sites: >Financial TV Streams: >Charts: >Screeners: so you feel like in the mov…

Open thread • Replies: 336 • Updated: 2026-04-27 17:52 UTC

OP

Ai doomers are broke edition

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com
https://www.khanacademy.org/economics-finance-domain

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners: so you feel like in the movies
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101: so zoomers with meme stocks can outperform you
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc smg:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

>NEW THREAD: Copy-paste the following when making a new thread:
https://pastebin.com/GfB48W5G

Previously on /smg/
>>62159050

62160175

62160179

62160182

62160966

62160972

SpaceX

You're retarded if you don't buy all these and just hold.

62160977

62160981
fuck me fuck my ass

>>62160964
rich people will them pay some wagies to protect them from the cannibal gangs of former wagies because it turns out unbalancing the underpinning of sociey is a bad idea, your bunker won't actually protect you from a determined army and your factories and power plants and fields are all very vulnerable.

62160988

62160991

62161012

62161013

62161014

62161026

62161032

62161046

62161059

62161060

62161062

item.title: Why the FUCK is life so fucking difficult (particularly the financial aspect of it). — 62 replies — 43.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why the FUCK is life so fucking difficult (particularly the financial aspect of it).

Open thread • Replies: 62 • Updated: 2026-04-27 19:46 UTC

OP

Why the FUCK is life so fucking difficult (particularly the financial aspect of it).

Early replies (first 3)

62155115
>>62155108
it's the way capitalism works, it's an annihilationist force that is counter to life. it will continue until we're all dead and earth has been completely liquidated. I dont' know why we do this to ourselves

>uncleted.jpg

62155117
LUCK is the biggest factor in life.

62155122
>>62155115
Just like cancer

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62155773
>>62155765
The issue is you see an asset that is going parabolic, you say “yeah, this is it” and then it does 2x, 4x, etc. but the very fucking moment you hop in, you’re down 30 percent. Right now, everyone is getting rich on the AI bottleneck trade. If I wasn’t holding bitcoin, I’d just say fuck it and hop in.

62155777
>>62155198
>you could literally live with your parents, collect welfare and then go all in on stocks while eating chicken tendies. how is it difficult? you're lucky you weren't born during the middle ages
lmao literally me except i dont eat tendies
i am currently investing 100% in ftse all world and while it grows well idk if i can escape the neet life with it. also i can also only save up to 10k before the state cuts my neet money
dont even know what i would do with the money if i got lucky

62155782
>>62155773
I've been holding more cash specifically because of the AI stuff, I still invest but I think some kind of downturn is coming and I want to be able to jump at opportunities.
I really would never go all-in on some kind of "ai bottleneck", it's just gambling. Sure, gamble with 25% if you really want to.

Recently houses have been going for 100k in my area (lockport new york because people will say this is fake) and I'm waiting for an even further dip as boomers die off, which has actually been happening because all land owners in my area are 75.

62155861
>>62155782
The outsized returns come with the gambling. Don’t get me wrong, all of my money is in VOO and bitcoin. But it causes deep distress to see people printing off of leveraged sector ETFs. Real estate is sometimes the move. Homes that were $100k in 2002 are now sometimes $1.3m. But I’ve also seen other areas that were the next big thing, and they’ve crabbed for decades.

My take? New York has had net population losses for a while. Buffalo is doing better in recent years, but will it extend to Lockport? Unsure.

62155878
>>62155115
>>62155122
>>62155117
Can't believe you retards haven't figured out the real answer. I'll give you a hint, it's jews.

62155879
>>62155861
>But will it extend to Lockport?
It already has, but in rural areas. My city is in a decline in population and nobody's making any money here and never will, which is where my edge comes in.
Since I'm not 75 and not literally dying to sell off my shit to pay for a new truck I can get along maintaining and renting houses, and it's no big loss to have one I have to sell because I can do basically all cosmetic work myself.

But people are desperate to escape city shitholes so small suburb areas and even lockport have seen buffalo growth.

62155881
>>62155108
Because of genetic determinism and how the modern world works. We have abundance thanks to modern tech and slave labor from third world countries but everyone wants to have access to the wealth. Meanwhile the state simply prints more money making your money worth less. The only way to counter this is by having assets that are not bound to this or scale higher then inflation. We still have law of nature, the fittest aka the most adaptable wins and will be on top, just that most people who would die normally are being dragged on for some reason.

62155923
>>62155108
just stop caring
i havent done laundry in over a year. my apartment is a disaster and i eat like once every 3-4 days out of pure lazyness.
i have no friends never go out other than work.
i take several stimulants to keep my brain on autopilot at work so im not really "there"
i recently lost the will to commute so i just uber it both ways
when i get home i just rot in bed, look at the numbers move and watch oneyplays until i pass out.
sometimes ill play something on my 'eck if im feeling especially motivated.
i just dont care anymore.

62155978
>>62155108
too many people

62156145
>>62155259
>you are framed and jailed for sexual assault,
kek, definitely a thing that happens to normal, well-adjusted people

62156342
>>62155878
jews are huma....oh wait!

62156367
>>62155198
What to invest in tho?
Nothing gives more than 5% annual returns these days unless you do degenerate options gambling

62156382
>>62155130
>where it was financially optimal to take care of your cows and pigs so that they lived happy lives
This is impossible regardless of how well you treat your livestock. Beef cattle are typically slaughtered when they're somewhere between 1-2 years old. Dairy cattle are slaughtered once their milk production starts to decline, around 5 years old.

The natural lifespan of a cow is 20-30 years. You could treat your cattle incredibly well but you're still killing them when they're basically children. Killing a 1-2 year old cow is equivalent to killing a 6-8 year old human. If you were treated very well for the first 8 years of your life before being slaughtered so some alien species could eat you, would you consider that you lived a happy life?

62156385
>>62155108
in order for the few percentage of rich population to enjoy the leisure time, you need a society of people jsut barely getting by so they need to be at work as much as possible making either you or your rich buddies money. all the while keeping you out of their way for a majority of the week.

62156388
>>62156382
I'd have been eaten in 2000, being a wagecuck in 2026.

62156412
>>62155159
seriously though I have this, idk, risk aversion disability where even if something is 99% likely to make big gains if I just hold for a year, I will constantly panic sell and then cry afterwards. I don't know what the fuck is wrong with me. It's happened like 5 times now.

62156445
>>62155923
>oneyplays

dude go get some help tf

62156449
>>62156367
you have to gamble if you want to win. There are too many people on earth for you to make it without taking on risk.

62156515
>>62156476
pretty much nailed it

62156850
>>62155878
Stop noticing

62158142
>>62156388
The correct way

62159587
>>62155173
Tell that to the software engineers who are all getting fired.

62160155
>>62155242
>be white
>pay taxes
>COVID destroys everything Ive ever built
>mexicans get shit tons of free money
>Trump doesn't deport all of them
>releases a shitcoin that dumps
>no doge money
>IRS still exists

Quite literally nothing good financially has come to me trying to be a good goy

I think right wingers are just retarded goys. Trump is likely to go down as the biggest fucking liar in history. Atleast Biden got his missions done, money to illegals and such.

I should of just sold drugs and gotten circumcised.

Sieg Hiel.

62160160
>>62155259
Everything you mentioned that sucks later in life is based on relations with women. Wise anon. Women are the devil.

62160302
>>62156412
having a job helps because you can always make more money and take more shots.

half these people are unemployed looking to 100x 8k and they only get one shot lol.

62160337
I was born with no luck and currently at 36 I have no money and cant find a job
I am just waiting to die

62160478
Capitalism became too unregulated and too unbalanced in favor of the rich.
>I want to open a $1 burger stand next to a McDonalds
>I would be hit with lawsuits about lack of licenses and anti-monopoly practices
BUT
>coporations bring in endless cheap brown labor to side step all the labor laws
>worker can't sue over this or the anti-labor laws

62161057
>>62155108
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62161099
>>62155923
do you have any other advice?

62162951
>>62155259
>companionship, sex, offspring, status

item.title: TSLA quarterly profit — 7 replies — 28.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
TSLA quarterly profit

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-04-27 21:09 UTC

OP

Is Tesla about to be the first big growth company sliding back to being unprofitable?
What is their way out?

>https://www.macrotrends.net/stocks/charts/TSLA/tesla/net-income

Early replies (first 3)

62162749
>>62162712
>quarterly profit
Their capex guidance for 2026 is $25 Billions.
>What is their way out?
Fsd subscription, cyber cab, batteries/energy storage, robots, Digital Optimus.

62162815
i will never buy tesla
for me its the ethereum of stocks
only onion faggots buy eth and tsla

62162837
>>62162712
You just don't get it the market is forward looking and they see the writing on the wall with all the political networking being done on the regulatory side. There is clearly a large government contract in the pipeline for robotics where the president will hire a TSLA robot to infiltrate fort Knox and steal all the gold but then in an unforeseen twist that gold will of course be gone and they will try to pin it on the robot which will become a fugitive, backstabbed, betrayed and on the run, he will then don an eye patch and start his own PMC to clear his name of any wrongdoing and only at that moment will everyone realize that robots can actually develop consciousness. And then you'll be sorry you didn't invest in this incredible growth story.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62162903
>>62162712
Tsla sucks elon is gay wish I had bought TSLL at this time in 2024

62162959
>>62162749
>Subscriptions for services in your car
I feel like this is going to blow up in their faces.

62162978
>>62162712
Growth means low profit retard. They are reinvesting their revenue into new technology, not giving it back to investors who want a safe return.

62163285
>>62162978
They're paying off HUGE debt for buying Twitter at double price in the past.

item.title: SHORT MEMORY STOCKS RIGHT FUCKING NOW NIGGERS!!!! — 33 replies — 13.6/hr

SHORT MEMORY STOCKS RIGHT FUCKING NOW NIGGERS!!!!

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-04-27 18:47 UTC

OP

YOU HAVE NO IDEA. THIS IS 10x WORSE THAN TURBOQUANT.

Early replies (first 3)

62150764
>>62150761
proof??

62150766
>>62150764
EAT IT. DROPPED 30 MINS AGO.
https://huggingface.co/collections/deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4

62150776
>>62150766

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62150779
>>62150766

62150780
>>62150761
done. 10x leverage.

62150782
>>62150779
Uses 10% of the memory of other SOTA AI models while maintaining equivalent benchmarks. Every AI company is about to get assraped.

62150787
>>62150761
>>62150782
This same conundrum happened with Turboquant. Using less memory means we can do more with our memory. This is not an issue

62150789
i busted your moms sk hynix

62150790
>>62150787
Normies will think otherwise when the press gets hold of this. Also basic supply and demand. AI companies in the short term will have to play catch up. Datacenters won't be buying any RAM until then. I agree that this is bullish in the long term though.

62150798
>>62150782
this happens every weeks, model always ends up being shit and nothing happens..

62150799
>>62150766
NEW FUD JUST DROPPED

62150803
>>62150761

This still needs shit tons of memory. 128GB minimum to locally host it.

62150804
>>62150790
The thing is that memory is necessary retardless, it means they can buy even more memory for even more complex calculations.

But I do agree that memory stocks will probably take a haircut in the short term. I only wish I was less of a ngga last year or the year before and went harder I won't fuck up this time bitches gonna drop six sigma figgos in at the lows.

62150811
>>62150782

62150815
>>62150761

62150838

if it was true then btc would have crashed chuddie

62152006
GUYS? GUYS? GUYS? WE NEED TO SHORT MEMORY GUYS! WE NEED TO SHORT IT NOW!

Yeah I hope you got out with your 2%. This is definitely no Turboquant

62152234
I finna get me sum cheap computer parts

62152238
>>62150761
I have a bad memory!

62152335
Historically if you look at Chink nand, it doing well hasn't hurt people like SNDK.
Deepseek is more bullish for CXMT, because Huawei wants to source their hbm domestically.
What follows is that I don't think samsung/skhynix/micron end up hurt by any of this Chinese demand. It's more demand not less I dunno what OP is smoking.

62153018
>>62152335
Because the Chinks don't even attempt to undercut, they charge an even higher premium, if they ever actually sold at a discount.

62154589
>>62150761

62154617
>>62150782
>>62150798 This. It's just made up shit to attempt crashing share prices so they can slurp. Happens every time.

62156802
>>62154617

62156835
>>62150761

62156842
>>62150766

The news has been priced in decades ago.

62156848
More memory efficient AI causes more ambitious AI projects which increases memory use.

That has been the reality for years now. But yes, there is a small chance for a small short term dip from this news.

62156860
>investment fund I’m heavy into recently sold everything it had in openai to become even more *squints* Klarna heavy
How fucked am I?

62156952
>>62150761
i'll believe that when i can afford to upgrade

62157882
>>62156835

62159207
>>62150782
>AI is now even more efficient than we thought
I don't think you understand what you're saying. That wouldn't result a 10x datacenter oversupply, instead it results in 10x more/better/smarter models.

62159211

62162769
>>62150761

item.title: MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession… — 24 replies — 10.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession…

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-04-27 18:58 UTC

OP

MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage professionally edited with a pro-quality thumbnail attached. He says people don't do this because they either don't understand how easy it is to game the YouTube algorithm or they're just lazy. He says doing anything extreme on YouTube is still low-hanging fruit for fame and money, even now. So why haven't you taken his advice?

Early replies (first 3)

62161084
Even if that were true (doubt), doing youtube is gig-work, more akin to driving for Uber eats than the entrepreneurship that youtubers think they're engaging in. You can think you're "self-employed" until you do something that Google doesn't like, and then you'll find out who your boss really is.

62161086
>>62161076
The glownigger puppet wants more people to upload surveillance for the government online? And setting yourself up to be cancelled by mob mentality and no longer having actual skills for a job and a resume gap meaning you’ll never enter the workforce again?

62161087
i manage my own portfolio and fap all day, what makes you think im gonna get up and film my jew ass talking to a bunch of goyim for the entertainment of other goyim?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62161107
>>62161076
>walking
>US
Getting arrested is good for views I guess.

62161120
>anyone
What about an awkward autist with barely understandable speech?

62161122
>>62161076
Trumps personal police force ICE would just shoot you for for filming in public

62161134
>walking across
More like driving across and foling yourself hiking for a few minutes

62161135
>>62161076
Oh yeah? So why he didn't get millions of views? Yeah I guess the classic goycattle quote "he didn't work hard enough" right?https://m.youtube.com/@theLIVINproject/videos

62161142
>>62161135
What part of 'professionally edited with a pro-quality thumbnail attached' did you miss?

62161154
>>62161142
>noooooo you must take a photo from your footage that is already in the video as thumbnail put some goycattle shit in it so goycattle watch it
God I fucking hate ecelebs and their "fans". First people to get the bullet before anyone else should be you and them

62161156
>>62161076
There's whores and then there is Mr Beast...

62161182
>professional editing
So you have to pay someone

62161185
>>62161084
same can be said for actors

62161541
>>62161135
It's not the editing though it wouldn't have hurt >>62161142 >>62161154
It's because they didn't talk to other people. Who wants to watch 2000 hours of two fags walking?
They were supposed to do interviews with cleetus and lashonda and other multiculti adventures

62162173
psychopaths should be culled at school age to prevent this kind of thing. Does he not understand you'd need to have money to do this in the first place and wouldn't be able to work for the half a year it took you to do this, along with it being physically grueling

62162184
>>62161076
im tired of seeing mr beast-esque channels all over youtube, what are some actual good channels?

62162212
>>62161154
you not liking something doesn't mean it's not effective, whiny little turd

62162225
>>62162184
>channels
is what ruined it, just look up what you want to see and click the most homely video

62162234
>>62161086
>resume gap = you'll never enter the workforce again
sounds like the economy's problem, call me when applying for jobs is based on competence instead of meaningless retard criteria

62162262
>>62161076
He is somewhat correct, but you have to do it right requires very expensive production team

62162269
>>62161076
you also have to not be able to grow a beard above your neck

62162303
>>62161076
how do you make the thumbnail then?
I make extremely low effort shorts and get thousands of views everytime

62162786
>>62161076
Can any terminally online brown zoomer please explain to the rest of us normie chads who this guy is?

62162805
>>62161076
>So why haven't you taken his advice?
why haven't you, faggot? kys

item.title: XRP is the biggest scam ever — 48 replies — 6.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
XRP is the biggest scam ever

Open thread • Replies: 48 • Updated: 2026-04-27 14:00 UTC

OP

they sell token to shift money over to the tradfi company Ripple to buy actual companies and assets and don't pay any dividends or yield on actual xrp tokens. I've seen actual xrp baggies say this is somehow a good thing.

Early replies (first 3)

62143238
Gee, wonder what they could buy

62143321
>>62143203
Means I can buy more for less. BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

62143438
>>62143203
>ethereum foundation sells ETH and what
>Chainlink labs sells LINK and what

hypocrites and mind raped baggies

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62146506
>>62146502
>not a single product requires the usage of LINK
All products use CL nodes, therefore requiring the usage of Link.

You're probably going to loop right back to "but you didn't purchase the Link directly".

>no, subsidies do not matter at all, sorry
But you're the one who brought up the subsidies.

What a shitty chatbot.

62146532
>>62146506
you do realize that once Chainlink implodes, you along with all the other paid marketeers will be in grave danger? you do realize that attacking your entire online persona around a crypto scamcoin will inevitably end bad for you?
tick, tock...

62146544
>>62146532
>paid marketeer
I'm not the one lying, moving goalposts, forgetting my own talking points, and changing IDs.

Go ahead, name one CL product that does not use CL nodes (and therefore the Link token).

62146565
>>62146506
kill yourself before I find you, Rajesh

62146578
>says some bullshit
>gets debunked
>changes IDs and gets extremely emotional

many such cases, sad!

62147333
>>62145068
>to create their ecosystem is just pure dumping on the community?
What ecosystem? The one they claim is coming? None of the companies they bought have integrated XRPL.

62147341
>>62143203
>dont come to /biz/ for a year
>its still the same fucking threads by cultist linkies and xrp schizos
We’ll see you next year

62147491
>>62147341
it's literally the same 4 retards in every fucking thread

62147758
>>62146458
literally the same can be said of xrp kek

62147964
Chainlink is such a pathetic little project...

62148311
>>62147341
next year chainlink will be dead and buried though, and the catalogue will be flooded with frogposters crying about "why didn't you tell me????"

62151224
>>62147758
Fucking how?

62154431
>>62146230
Ripple don't sell to retail and their products are building around actual use. Chainlink sell every green candle directly to retail and built zero utility for the token that is itself completely disconnected from the actual product.

62155143
>>62154431
>Ripple don't sell to retail
After the lawsuit and the SEC waiver, if Ripple wanted to sell to institutions they'd have to file an application with the SEC saying "we want to sell securities".

These applications are public, so anyone can verify that Ripple have never filed such an application to sell XRP to institutions: https://www.sec.gov/edgar/browse/?CIK=1685012
Thus they've been selling to retail exclusively.

>built zero utility for the token
See >>62146402
Link token utility is absolute; every single CL feature and product requires it.

Meanwhile Ripple pretty much only builds products and buys companies that have nothing inherently to do with XRP.

62155954
i made this thread
you are all spiritually indian
when indians get criticized they say “well pakistan is shittier!”. i dont care about chainlink, i dont invest in link, its probably a paypig investor scam too, i made this thread about xrp and you xrp schizos all had to create this charicture in ur mind about how i must be a link shill

no
of ur first thought after reading a criticism of xrp is “well at least we arent chainlink investors” then,
you are spiritually indian

62156263
>>62155143
None of you have ever been able to explain how that would cause the price of the fundraising token to increase. If node operators are paid in lank, then they immediately turn around and sell those tokens for actual money, doesn’t that just increase sell pressure? I’m also slightly retarded, so feel free to explain it to me

62156366
>>62156263
>If node operators are paid in lank, then they immediately turn around and sell those tokens for actual money, doesn’t that just increase sell pressure?
That's how blockchain miners have always operated, you dip.

62156399
>>62156366
oh so it's not the future

62156865
>>62156399
Blockchain is absolutely the future. And it needs external data to become it.

62158109
>>62143238
Land

62158769
>>62147333
Checked but a 20 second search tells me you're incorrect.

62158900
>>62158769
Yet you didnt post any.

62158933
>>62143238
i hate brad so much

62158942
>>62156865
sure but chainst1nk is dinosaur tech
it's going to be the pets.com of blockchain

62158980
>>62158900
I'll save you the 20 seconds.
Ripple Treasury is an enterprise treasury management system (TMS) launched by Ripple following its $1 billion acquisition of the legacy treasury software provider GTreasury in October 2025.
Tell your boss to update the script.

62160355
>>62143203
BOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62161098
>>62158980
That shit works exactly the same as before Ripple bought it; without needing XRP or XRPL.

62161538
>>62158980
You wasted 20 seconds. That doesn't use XRPL. Its literally an existing business that has better cash flows than anything ripple has ever created.

62161619
>>62161538
>>62161098
My mistake i read it as XRP not XRPL. Lucky I'm at work and got paid for the wasted 20 seconds.

62161662
>>62161619
It uses neither.

item.title: BTC $60k WAITING ROOM — 12 replies — 6.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC $60k WAITING ROOM

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-04-27 19:21 UTC

OP

Hold onto your butts

Early replies (first 3)

62156626
>>62156623
omg pls no

62156636
>>62156623
Enjoy waiting endlessly.

62157781
>>62156623
90k @ may

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62158577
>>62157781
may 2029 sure

meantime you've been warned bro

62158760
>>62158577

Y tho

62158987
>>62158760
a record of the past is a prediction of the future

62158997
Why are we pumping like this on a sunday?? :( :( Not like this bearbros, not like this

62159020
two more days until japan raises rates and it all falls down

62159076
>>62159020

62160555
i'll show you a dump, c'mere

62160671
>>62156636
>Enjoy waiting endlessly.
>>62157781
>90k @ may
So many of you are in denial or simply fail to understand that Netanyahu refuses to let his war end, and he's got enough pull in the US to force compliance. How he came about that much influence? Who knows. But it's clear Trump isn't in the driver's seat. This will be priced in the markets soon. The US will be relatively okay, but there will be massive global panic.

62162873
>>62160555
> 40% down from ath
kekt and rekt

SIR BUY BITCOIN

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-04-27 19:55 UTC

OP

Here are all the trustworthy people I was telling you about HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA imagine you are still buying BITCOIN in 2026

Early replies (first 3)

62161981
>>62161937
I don't like the suit to t-shirt ratio. Bitcoin culture went to shit looong time ago.

62161986
Won’t lie, it’s not looking good

62162142
>>62161937
>meet the voices shaping bitcoin's future
>FBI director and US attorney general (both of whom abetted the hiding of the Epstein files among other bullshit)

lol

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62162230
>>62161937
there are still many years yet to pump and dump bitcorn before normies realize it isn't worth anything. maybe by '35 it will be over

62162583
>>62162230
it's already over. these are leeches attached to a bloated corpse

62162777
>>62161937
nice fag conference u have there bitchuds!

62162779
>>62161937
at this point if you are still in crypto you deserve to lose your money

62162987
>>62161937

item.title: Do you flex your BTC to your family or nah? — 69 replies — 5.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Do you flex your BTC to your family or nah?

Open thread • Replies: 69 • Updated: 2026-04-27 08:12 UTC

OP

Wondering if people actually talk about their BTC with family or just keep it lowkey.

>We never really know how long we have in life, so is it better to share it or keep it private?

Early replies (first 3)

62138671
>>62138453
I only have 1 so that's nothing to flex

62138680
People with more money than you won't give a shit and people with less money than you will resent you.

Keep your mouth shut and if anyone questions your purchases or your lifestyle, pretend to be in debt.

62138700
>>62138453
Keep that shit private, openly talking about how much money you have casually is trashy. Only discuss money with family with the intention of planning / sharing, otherwise they'll always have the thought that you have more to yourself. Speaking from experience with a good family, money brings out the absolute worst in people.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62150719
>>62142197
You never know

62150903
>>62148933
Still it has risks

62151073
>>62146671
I get that, but it’s better to check first before saying that. So far, it fits my standards. I don’t think firms like Ledger or even A16z would back it otherwise.

62151201
>>62148936
Greedy bastard

62151260
>>62151073
it's the same thing. Everything will fail in the end. Nothing survive

62151310
NEVER

62151368
>>62149941
Heartaches

62151461
>>62138453
How do we confess them?

62151818
>>62149941
Nice are you also waiting for the TBV launch? More interesting for me since it could unlock more use cases.

62152719
>>62142226
That's the goal lol

62152732
never ever tell anyone you own any crypto holy shit that is like rule #1 in life don't tell me you idiots are trying to orange pill your fucking friends and family

62152763
>>62138453
Why would you ever brag about your money? Especially when every cryptobro is a scrawny geek. Do you want to get tortured by niggers for your private key?

Secret wealthy is better

62153574
>>62150903
Every system has risk. The difference is just what kind of risk you’re exposed to and how much control you still keep over your assets.

62153589
>>62152732
Maybe it depends on who you’re closest to in your family. There’s usually one person you really vibe with.

62153929
>>62152763
Do what you wanna do

62154078
>>62142464
This here is the right play. Don't tell anyone how much money you have or flaunt it. It should be used to give you freedom not ego validation. Also when you reveal wealth to people they will try to use you and get some for themselves. Donate to charity and volunteer also though of course.

62154092
If you talk about bitcoin, people either assume you’re a sucker, a drug dealer, evading taxation, or a pedophile. I think what really limits its reach is that it’s technology, economics and political philosophy wrapped into an asset. Never selling.

62155160
>>62142464
Well...she's still your gf so do that...

62155300
>>62154092
Think the opposite

62155673
>>62155300
What’s the opposite?

62155774
I haven't told anyone how much I have invested, I just tell them my various investment schemes so they hopefully do something.
It's especially important for the kids because their zog parents tell them not to invest and to get a car for MUH FREEDOMS.

62155914
>>62151310
Ok, that's not a problem

62156005
Guys check out my crypto currency called hsgold I’m going to add a fair bit of liquidity at the end of the month when I get paid check it out highseasgold currently swapable for sol

62156014
>>62138453
That's RULE NUMBER ONE of the Ten Crack Commandments anon.

62157978
>>62138453
Don't do it

62158303
>>62154078
You are right too. Let's see anon.

62160744
>>62157978
Yeah okay anon

62160748
>>62156005
Memecoin again . hard pass

62160749
>>62155774
Just teach your family on how to be in crypto.

62161044
>>62145144
I was there. Poor anon got clowned hard that day. But it was fucking funny.
